creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On recent CURRENT (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 r307683: Thu Oct 20 22:08:55 CEST 2016) port security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi fails to compile:

[...]
Configuration Complete. Type 'make' to build.
===>  Building for cyrus-sasl-gssapi-2.1.26_7
cd /usr/ports/security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi/work/cyrus-sasl-2.1.26/include && /usr/bin/make
cc -emit-llvm  -Wall -W -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -c  -o .c.bco
cc: error: no input files
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi/work/cyrus-sasl-2.1.26/include
*** Error code 1
